ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, operator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the operation */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the operation */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit identifier for the product */,
  "warehouse" TEXT /* Warehouse identifier where the operation took place */,
  "warehouse_cell_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the specific cell in the warehouse */,
  "operation" TEXT /* Type of operation (e.g., first arrival) */,
  "invoice" INTEGER /* Invoice number associated with the operation */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the product */,
  "operation_cost" REAL /* Cost incurred during the operation */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the operation */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the operation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the operation (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_operations_sku FOREIGN KEY ("sku") REFERENCES products ("sku"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_operations_warehouse_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_cell_id") REFERENCES warehouse_cells ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager responsible for the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit identifier for the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "purchase_cost" REAL /* Cost of purchasing the product */,
  "delivery_cost" REAL /* Cost of delivering the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sku")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse_cells" (
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cell in the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse the cell belongs to */,
  "cell_location" TEXT /* Location description of the cell */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum storage capacity of the cell */,
  "temperature_control" INTEGER /* Whether the cell has temperature control */,
  "humidity_control" INTEGER /* Whether the cell has humidity control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_cells_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_levels" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inventory record */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit identifier for the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell where the product is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_levels_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES warehouse_cells ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_levels_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_levels_sku FOREIGN KEY ("sku") REFERENCES products ("sku")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the change */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the record affected by the change */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column affected by the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the column */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
